name: planwright
description: Grounded codebase planning for AI coding agents. It audits a repository and writes a verification-ready checkbox plan where every item cites real file:line evidence and a runnable verification, then can optionally implement and verify each item one commit at a time.

interface.longDescription: Planwright scans and audits a codebase, writes grounded plan items to .planwright/plan.md, and can execute verified items one commit at a time.
defaultPrompt: Run codvisor to harden this repo
